assertion.description: State should contain a summary field

assertionResults.actual: The codebase has a small utility library with TypeScript modules organized under src/. src/index.ts is the entry point that re-exports the math functions (add, subtract, multiply) defined with simple numeric parameter implementations in src/math.ts and the string helpers (capitalize, slugify) defined in src/utils.ts. The structure keeps math and string utilities separated while providing a central barrel export for consumers.

State should confirm fix was applied
